misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: front matter with table of contents, General Board member listings, advertisers directory, various advertisements for local Salt Lake City businesses, recipe content (Pear Bread), and what appears to be a temple chart description. There is a fragment that begins 'I thought you sisters in the West perhaps would like to hear About the fine' but this is too short and incomplete to extract as a standalone article - it appears to be a cutoff from another piece.
